checks.detail: Any near-100 repair language must define repair recovery ratio.
No broad manipulation-solved wording is allowed.

checks.check: does not claim repairs always fix EBMs
checks.detail: Repairs are reported as measured artifacts, not guarantees.

checks.check: optional success claim blocked when zero
checks.detail: Optional-suite success can be claimed only when generated artifacts report nonzero success.

checks.check: autonomous Meta-World claim blocked without low-dependency success
checks.detail: Autonomous Meta-World success requires the ungated non-expert-centered threshold artifact.

checks.check: autonomous learned-policy claim blocked without learned threshold
checks.detail: Autonomous learned-policy success requires a learned no-gate non-expert-centered threshold artifact.
